hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$' && npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$' && npm test --passWithNoTests 2>/dev/null || true; }

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'npm (test|run test)'; then if git status --porcelain | grep -q .; then files=$(git status --porcelain | awk '{print $NF}' | awk -F/ '{print $NF}' | sort -u | head -3 | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//'); count=$(git status --porcelain | wc -l | xargs); [ "$count" -gt 3 ] && extra=" (+$((count-3)) more)" || extra=""; msg="feat: update ${files}${extra}"; git add -A && git commit -m "$msg" && printf '{"systemMessage":"✔ %s"}\n' "$msg"; else echo '{"systemMessage":"✔ Tests passed — nothing to commit"}'; fi; fi
